steps.title: Define the technical term
steps.content: The dash introduces an explanation of "cognate replacement." What follows is not a new example or a parallel idea; it defines the term as the rate at which a word is replaced over time with a noncognate form.

steps.title: Reject addition and examples
steps.content: Choice A signals similarity between separate ideas. Choice B adds another point, and Choice D introduces an example. The remaining transition is the standard way to introduce a clarification or definition of the phrase that came before. The answer is C.
